basic_details.job_title: Govt UG HSS Peturu Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Govt UG HSS Peturu has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 0 Guest Faculty Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Govt UG HSS Peturu office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Guest Faculty: Maximum age limit is 65 years.

qualification.details: Guest Faculty: Retired Govt./ Non-Govt., Aided teachers below 65 years of age Fresh candidates who have secured minimum 50% marks in PG in respective subjects B.Ed. Degree (Except in Logic/Philosophy, Sociology subjects) & PGDCA will be given weightage.

salary_details.details: Guest Faculty: Rs. 400/- per class subject to a maximum of 50 classes in a month.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Govt UG HSS Peturu Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Faculty positions at Govt UG HSS Peturu is scheduled for 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate (PG) degree in the respective subjects with a minimum of 50% marks. A B.Ed. degree is also required, with a weightage given to those with a PGDCA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the Guest Faculty role?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Guest Faculty position is below 65 years of age. Retired government or non-government aided teachers are also eligible if they meet this criterion.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The salary for Guest Faculty is Rs. 400/- per class, with a maximum limit of 50 classes per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Guest Faculty position at Govt UG HSS Peturu?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to attend a walk-in interview with their complete bio-data, passport-size photographs, and all original and self-attested photocopies of certificates from HSC to PG.

faq.question: Q6. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You must carry your complete bio-data, two passport-size photographs, and all original certificates and mark sheets from HSC to PG, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty positions will be based on a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Which subjects are covered under the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment covers subjects such as Odia, Economics, History, English, Sociology, and Political Science for Higher Secondary classes (+2).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview for Govt UG HSS Peturu Guest Faculty posts going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Govt UG HSS Peturu office, located at Peturu, Koraput, Odisha, 764039.
